### [FileInfo](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#fileinfo)

[Section titled “FileInfo”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#fileinfo)

A FileInfo describes a file and is returned by `stat`, `lstat` or `fstat`.

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-12)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-12)

2.0.0

#### [Properties](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-5)

[Section titled “Properties”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-5)

| Property | Type | Description | Defined in |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `atime` | `null` \| [`Date`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Date) | The last access time of the file. This corresponds to the `atime` field from `stat` on Unix and `ftLastAccessTime` on Windows. This may not be available on all platforms. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L120](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L120) |
| `birthtime` | `null` \| [`Date`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Date) | The creation time of the file. This corresponds to the `birthtime` field from `stat` on Mac/BSD and `ftCreationTime` on Windows. This may not be available on all platforms. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L126](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L126) |
| `blksize` | `null` \| `number` | Blocksize for filesystem I/O. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L203](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L203) |
| `blocks` | `null` \| `number` | Number of blocks allocated to the file, in 512-byte units. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L211](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L211) |
| `dev` | `null` \| `number` | ID of the device containing the file. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L146](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L146) |
| `fileAttributes` | `null` \| `number` | This field contains the file system attribute information for a file or directory. For possible values and their descriptions, see [File Attribute Constants](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/fileio/file-attribute-constants)<br> in the Windows Dev Center Platform-specific - **macOS / Linux / Android / iOS:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L138](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L138) |
| `gid` | `null` \| `number` | Group ID of the owner of this file. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L187](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L187) |
| `ino` | `null` \| `number` | Inode number. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L154](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L154) |
| `isDirectory` | `boolean` | True if this is info for a regular directory. Mutually exclusive to `FileInfo.isFile` and `FileInfo.isSymlink`. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L99](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L99) |
| `isFile` | `boolean` | True if this is info for a regular file. Mutually exclusive to `FileInfo.isDirectory` and `FileInfo.isSymlink`. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L94](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L94) |
| `isSymlink` | `boolean` | True if this is info for a symlink. Mutually exclusive to `FileInfo.isFile` and `FileInfo.isDirectory`. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L104](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L104) |
| `mode` | `null` \| `number` | The underlying raw `st_mode` bits that contain the standard Unix permissions for this file/directory. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L163](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L163) |
| `mtime` | `null` \| [`Date`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Date) | The last modification time of the file. This corresponds to the `mtime` field from `stat` on Linux/Mac OS and `ftLastWriteTime` on Windows. This may not be available on all platforms. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L114](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L114) |
| `nlink` | `null` \| `number` | Number of hard links pointing to this file. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L171](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L171) |
| `rdev` | `null` \| `number` | Device ID of this file. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L195](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L195) |
| `readonly` | `boolean` | Whether this is a readonly (unwritable) file. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L128](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L128) |
| `size` | `number` | The size of the file, in bytes. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L108](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L108) |
| `uid` | `null` \| `number` | User ID of the owner of this file. Platform-specific - **Windows:** Unsupported. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L179](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L179) |

* * *

### [MkdirOptions](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#mkdiroptions)

[Section titled “MkdirOptions”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#mkdiroptions)

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-13)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-13)

2.0.0

#### [Properties](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-6)

[Section titled “Properties”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-6)

| Property | Type | Description | Defined in |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `baseDir?` | [`BaseDirectory`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#basedirectory) | Base directory for `path` | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L631](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L631) |
| `mode?` | `number` | Permissions to use when creating the directory (defaults to `0o777`, before the process’s umask). Ignored on Windows. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L625](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L625) |
| `recursive?` | `boolean` | Defaults to `false`. If set to `true`, means that any intermediate directories will also be created (as with the shell command `mkdir -p`). | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L629](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L629) |

* * *

### [OpenOptions](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#openoptions)

[Section titled “OpenOptions”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#openoptions)

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-14)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-14)

2.0.0

#### [Properties](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-7)

[Section titled “Properties”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-7)

| Property | Type | Description | Defined in |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `append?` | `boolean` | Sets the option for the append mode. This option, when `true`, means that writes will append to a file instead of overwriting previous contents. Note that setting `{ write: true, append: true }` has the same effect as setting only `{ append: true }`. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L518](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L518) |
| `baseDir?` | [`BaseDirectory`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#basedirectory) | Base directory for `path` | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L546](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L546) |
| `create?` | `boolean` | Sets the option to allow creating a new file, if one doesn’t already exist at the specified path. Requires write or append access to be used. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L531](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L531) |
| `createNew?` | `boolean` | Defaults to `false`. If set to `true`, no file, directory, or symlink is allowed to exist at the target location. Requires write or append access to be used. When createNew is set to `true`, create and truncate are ignored. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L538](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L538) |
| `mode?` | `number` | Permissions to use if creating the file (defaults to `0o666`, before the process’s umask). Ignored on Windows. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L544](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L544) |
| `read?` | `boolean` | Sets the option for read access. This option, when `true`, means that the file should be read-able if opened. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L504](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L504) |
| `truncate?` | `boolean` | Sets the option for truncating a previous file. If a file is successfully opened with this option set it will truncate the file to `0` size if it already exists. The file must be opened with write access for truncate to work. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L525](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L525) |
| `write?` | `boolean` | Sets the option for write access. This option, when `true`, means that the file should be write-able if opened. If the file already exists, any write calls on it will overwrite its contents, by default without truncating it. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L511](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L511) |

* * *

### [RenameOptions](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#renameoptions)

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-18)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-18)

2.0.0

#### [Properties](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-11)

[Section titled “Properties”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-11)

| Property | Type | Description | Defined in |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

### [WriteFileOptions](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writefileoptions)

[Section titled “WriteFileOptions”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writefileoptions)

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-23)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-23)

2.0.0

#### [Properties](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-16)

[Section titled “Properties”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#properties-16)

| Property | Type | Description | Defined in |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `append?` | `boolean` | Defaults to `false`. If set to `true`, will append to a file instead of overwriting previous contents. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1045](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1045) |
| `baseDir?` | [`BaseDirectory`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#basedirectory) | Base directory for `path` | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1053](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1053) |
| `create?` | `boolean` | Sets the option to allow creating a new file, if one doesn’t already exist at the specified path (defaults to `true`). | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1047](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1047) |
| `createNew?` | `boolean` | Sets the option to create a new file, failing if it already exists. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1049](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1049) |
| `mode?` | `number` | File permissions. Ignored on Windows. | **Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1051](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1051) |

[Functions](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#functions)

------------------------------------------------------------------

[Section titled “Functions”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#functions)

### [copyFile()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#copyfile)

[Section titled “copyFile()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#copyfile)

    function copyFile(   fromPath,   toPath,options?): Promise<void>

Copies the contents and permissions of one file to another specified path, by default creating a new file if needed, else overwriting.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-5)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-5)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `fromPath` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `toPath` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`CopyFileOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#copyfileoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-9)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-9)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`void`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-5)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-5)

    import { copyFile, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';await copyFile('app.conf', 'app.conf.bk', { fromPathBaseDir: BaseDirectory.AppConfig, toPathBaseDir: BaseDirectory.AppConfig });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-30)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-30)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L601](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L601)

* * *

### [create()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#create)

[Section titled “create()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#create)

    function create(path, options?): Promise<FileHandle>

Creates a file if none exists or truncates an existing file and resolves to an instance of [`FileHandle`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#filehandle)
.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-6)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-6)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`CreateOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#createoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-10)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-10)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<[`FileHandle`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#filehandle)
\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-6)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-6)

    import { create, BaseDirectory } from "@tauri-apps/plugin-fs"const file = await create("foo/bar.txt", { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppConfig });await file.write(new TextEncoder().encode("Hello world"));await file.close();

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-31)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-31)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L480](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L480)

* * *

### [exists()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#exists)

[Section titled “exists()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#exists)

    function exists(path, options?): Promise<boolean>

Check if a path exists.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-7)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-7)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`ExistsOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#existsoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-11)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-11)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`boolean`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-7)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-7)

    import { exists, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';// Check if the `$APPDATA/avatar.png` file existsawait exists('avatar.png', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppData });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-32)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-32)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1156](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1156)

* * *

### [lstat()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#lstat)

[Section titled “lstat()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#lstat)

    function lstat(path, options?): Promise<FileInfo>

Resolves to a [`FileInfo`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#fileinfo)
 for the specified `path`. If `path` is a symlink, information for the symlink will be returned instead of what it points to.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-8)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-8)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`StatOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#statoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-12)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-12)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<[`FileInfo`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#fileinfo)
\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-8)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-8)

    import { lstat, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';const fileInfo = await lstat("hello.txt", { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });console.log(fileInfo.isFile); // true

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-33)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-33)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L984](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L984)

* * *

### [mkdir()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#mkdir)

[Section titled “mkdir()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#mkdir)

    function mkdir(path, options?): Promise<void>

Creates a new directory with the specified path.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-9)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-9)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`MkdirOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#mkdiroptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-13)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-13)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`void`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-9)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-9)

    import { mkdir, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';await mkdir('users', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-34)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-34)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L644](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L644)

* * *

### [open()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#open)

[Section titled “open()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#open)

    function open(path, options?): Promise<FileHandle>

Open a file and resolve to an instance of [`FileHandle`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#filehandle)
. The file does not need to previously exist if using the `create` or `createNew` open options. It is the callers responsibility to close the file when finished with it.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-10)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-10)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`OpenOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#openoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-14)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-14)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<[`FileHandle`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#filehandle)
\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-10)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-10)

    import { open, BaseDirectory } from "@tauri-apps/plugin-fs"const file = await open("foo/bar.txt", { read: true, write: true, baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });// Do work with fileawait file.close();

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-35)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-35)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L565](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L565)

* * *

### [readDir()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readdir)

[Section titled “readDir()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readdir)

    function readDir(path, options?): Promise<DirEntry[]>

Reads the directory given by path and returns an array of `DirEntry`.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-11)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-11)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`ReadDirOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readdiroptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-15)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-15)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<[`DirEntry`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#direntry)
\[\]>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-11)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-11)

    import { readDir, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';import { join } from '@tauri-apps/api/path';const dir = "users"const entries = await readDir('users', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });processEntriesRecursively(dir, entries);async function processEntriesRecursively(parent, entries) {  for (const entry of entries) {    console.log(`Entry: ${entry.name}`);    if (entry.isDirectory) {       const dir = await join(parent, entry.name);      processEntriesRecursively(dir, await readDir(dir, { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData }))    }  }}

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-36)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-36)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L706](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L706)

* * *

### [readFile()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readfile)

[Section titled “readFile()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readfile)

    function readFile(path, options?): Promise<Uint8Array>

Reads and resolves to the entire contents of a file as an array of bytes. TextDecoder can be used to transform the bytes to string if required.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-12)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-12)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`ReadFileOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readfileoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-16)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-16)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<[`Uint8Array`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Uint8Array)
\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-12)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-12)

    import { readFile, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';const contents = await readFile('avatar.png', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.Resource });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-37)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-37)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L739](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L739)

* * *

### [readTextFile()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readtextfile)

[Section titled “readTextFile()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readtextfile)

    function readTextFile(path, options?): Promise<string>

Reads and returns the entire contents of a file as UTF-8 string.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-13)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-13)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`ReadFileOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readfileoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-17)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-17)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`string`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-13)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-13)

    import { readTextFile, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';const contents = await readTextFile('app.conf', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppConfig });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-38)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-38)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L765](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L765)

* * *

### [readTextFileLines()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readtextfilelines)

[Section titled “readTextFileLines()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readtextfilelines)

    function readTextFileLines(path, options?): Promise<AsyncIterableIterator<string>>

Returns an async AsyncIterableIterator over the lines of a file as UTF-8 string.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-14)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-14)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`ReadFileOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#readfileoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-18)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-18)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`AsyncIterableIterator`<`string`\>>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-14)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-14)

    import { readTextFileLines, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';const lines = await readTextFileLines('app.conf', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppConfig });for await (const line of lines) {  console.log(line);}

You could also call AsyncIterableIterator.next to advance the iterator so you can lazily read the next line whenever you want.

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-39)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-39)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L798](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L798)

* * *

### [remove()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#remove)

[Section titled “remove()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#remove)

    function remove(path, options?): Promise<void>

Removes the named file or directory. If the directory is not empty and the `recursive` option isn’t set to true, the promise will be rejected.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-15)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-15)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`RemoveOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#removeoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-19)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-19)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`void`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-15)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-15)

    import { remove, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';await remove('users/file.txt', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });await remove('users', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-40)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-40)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L879](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L879)

* * *

### [rename()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#rename)

[Section titled “rename()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#rename)

    function rename(   oldPath,   newPath,options?): Promise<void>

Renames (moves) oldpath to newpath. Paths may be files or directories. If newpath already exists and is not a directory, rename() replaces it. OS-specific restrictions may apply when oldpath and newpath are in different directories.

On Unix, this operation does not follow symlinks at either path.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-16)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-16)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `oldPath` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `newPath` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`RenameOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#renameoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-20)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-20)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`void`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-16)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-16)

    import { rename, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';await rename('avatar.png', 'deleted.png', { oldPathBaseDir: BaseDirectory.App, newPathBaseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-41)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-41)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L918](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L918)

* * *

### [size()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#size)

[Section titled “size()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#size)

    function size(path): Promise<number>

Get the size of a file or directory. For files, the `stat` functions can be used as well.

If `path` is a directory, this function will recursively iterate over every file and every directory inside of `path` and therefore will be very time consuming if used on larger directories.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-17)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-17)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-21)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-21)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`number`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-17)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-17)

    import { size, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';// Get the size of the `$APPDATA/tauri` directory.const dirSize = await size('tauri', { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppData });console.log(dirSize); // 1024

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-42)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-42)

2.1.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1341](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1341)

* * *

### [stat()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#stat-1)

[Section titled “stat()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#stat-1)

    function stat(path, options?): Promise<FileInfo>

Resolves to a [`FileInfo`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#fileinfo)
 for the specified `path`. Will always follow symlinks but will reject if the symlink points to a path outside of the scope.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-18)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-18)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `options`? | [`StatOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#statoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-22)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-22)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<[`FileInfo`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#fileinfo)
\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-18)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-18)

    import { stat, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';const fileInfo = await stat("hello.txt", { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });console.log(fileInfo.isFile); // true

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-43)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-43)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L958](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L958)

* * *

### [truncate()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#truncate-1)

[Section titled “truncate()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#truncate-1)

    function truncate(   path,   len?,options?): Promise<void>

Truncates or extends the specified file, to reach the specified `len`. If `len` is `0` or not specified, then the entire file contents are truncated.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-19)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-19)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `len`? | `number` |
| `options`? | [`TruncateOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#truncateoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-23)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-23)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`void`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-19)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-19)

    import { truncate, readTextFile, writeTextFile, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';// truncate the entire fileawait truncate("my_file.txt", 0, { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });
    // truncate part of the fileconst filePath = "file.txt";await writeTextFile(filePath, "Hello World", { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });await truncate(filePath, 7, { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });const data = await readTextFile(filePath, { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });console.log(data);  // "Hello W"

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-44)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-44)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1024](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1024)

* * *

Watch changes (after a delay) on files or directories.

| `cb` | (`event`) => `void` |
| `options`? | [`DebouncedWatchOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#debouncedwatchoptions) |

<[`UnwatchFn`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#unwatchfn)
\>

Watch changes on files or directories.

### [writeFile()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writefile)

[Section titled “writeFile()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writefile)

    function writeFile(   path,   data,options?): Promise<void>

Write `data` to the given `path`, by default creating a new file if needed, else overwriting.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-22)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-22)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `data` | [`Uint8Array`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Uint8Array)<br> \| [`ReadableStream`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/ReadableStream)<br><[`Uint8Array`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Uint8Array)<br>\> |
| `options`? | [`WriteFileOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writefileoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-26)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-26)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`void`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-20)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-20)

    import { writeFile, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';
    let encoder = new TextEncoder();let data = encoder.encode("Hello World");await writeFile('file.txt', data, { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-47)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-47)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1069](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1069)

* * *

### [writeTextFile()](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writetextfile)

[Section titled “writeTextFile()”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writetextfile)

    function writeTextFile(   path,   data,options?): Promise<void>

Writes UTF-8 string `data` to the given `path`, by default creating a new file if needed, else overwriting.

#### [Parameters](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-23)

[Section titled “Parameters”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#parameters-23)

| Parameter | Type |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | `string` \| [`URL`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/URL) |
| `data` | `string` |
| `options`? | [`WriteFileOptions`](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#writefileoptions) |

#### [Returns](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-27)

[Section titled “Returns”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#returns-27)

[`Promise`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
<`void`\>

#### [Example](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-21)

[Section titled “Example”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#example-21)

    import { writeTextFile, BaseDirectory } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-fs';
    await writeTextFile('file.txt', "Hello world", { baseDir: BaseDirectory.AppLocalData });

#### [Since](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-48)

[Section titled “Since”](https://tauri.app/reference/javascript/fs/#since-48)

2.0.0

**Source**: [https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1118](https://github.com/tauri-apps/plugins-workspace/blob/v2/plugins/fs/guest-js/index.ts#L1118)
